# catalystcenter_wireless_fabric_multicast (Resource)

This resource manages the Wireless Multicast setting for a fabric site in Cisco Catalyst Center. It enables or disables multicast traffic forwarding to wireless clients within the specified fabric site. The fabric site must have a Wireless Controller assigned (`WIRELESS_CONTROLLER_NODE` role) and at least one fabric-enabled SSID before this resource can be configured. For optimal performance, ensure wired multicast is also enabled (see `catalystcenter_fabric_multicast_replication_mode`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "catalystcenter_wireless_fabric_multicast" "example" {
  fabric_id         = "8e6f7b3a-2b0b-4a7d-8b1c-0d4b1cd5e1b1"
  multicast_enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fabric_id` (String) The unique identifier of the fabric site
- `multicast_enabled` (Boolean) Enable or disable wireless multicast for the fabric site

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import catalystcenter_wireless_fabric_multicast.example "<fabric_id>"
```
